title: Spicy Macaroni Stir Fry
description: A quick and spicy Thai-inspired stir fry made with macaroni, vegetables, and a variety of sauces.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the macaroni, stir-fry sauce, coconut milk, chili flakes, and pasta seasoning.
Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until the sauce is bubbly and the macaroni is well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
